name: Lifesteal SMP RPG
description:
~ "WE ARE LIFESTEAL!"~

───────────────────────────────────────────────────

Welcome to a brutal survival world where every heart matters.

In this realm, killing players steals their hearts, making you stronger—while death makes you weaker. Lose all your hearts, and your existence is erased. Alliances are fragile, betrayal is common, and power is earned through blood.

You wake with limited hearts, nothing but instinct and a will to survive. Will you hunt others to grow stronger? Build a hidden base and avoid conflict? Or rise as a feared warlord, ruling through strength and intimidation?

Every choice shapes your fate. Every fight has consequences. Trust carefully—because in this world, even friends can become killers.

───────────────────────────────────────────────────
